blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Ensure that a quote is generated and presented to the customer before any booking is confirmed.

rawData.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of obtaining a quote/proposal before booking. However, the evidence provided indicates that a booking was made without a clear confirmation of a quote being issued prior to that booking. Specifically, the evidence from the prior steps does not include any details about a quote being generated or presented to the customer before the booking was confirmed, which constitutes a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of a quote/proposal being provided before the booking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify quote generation process
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Ensure that a quote is generated and presented to the customer before any booking is confirmed.
